company.name: Viatris Inc.
company.subtitle: Spinout of Mylan + Pfizer Upjohn (Nov 2020). FY2025 revenue $14.25B (-2% cc) across Developed Markets ~$8.5B / Greater China ~$2.3B / Emerging Markets ~$2.2B / JANZ ~$1.2B. Top legacy brands: Lipitor $1.55B, Norvasc $710M, Lyrica $487M, EpiPen $470M, Viagra $408M, Creon $366M, Yupelri $267M. Idorsia partnership Ph3 pipeline (selatogrel, cenerimod). Heavy net debt ~$11.2B post-merger.

assets.name: Lipitor (atorvastatin) - HMG-CoA reductase inhibitor (Pfizer Upjohn legacy)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Lipitor branded post-LOE residual ~3-4% LDL Rx volume

assets.name: Lyrica (pregabalin) - alpha-2-delta calcium channel modulator (Pfizer Upjohn)

indications.name: Neuropathic pain (post-LOE residual brand; Japan key)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: EpiPen ~50% US epi auto-injector share (vs Auvi-Q, generics)

company_slice_sources.row.reachPct: Viagra residual brand $408M FY25, mostly emerging markets

indications.name: Pancreatic exocrine insufficiency (chronic pancreatitis, CF, post-Whipple)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Creon ~70% US PERT share (vs Zenpep, Pancreaze)

assets.name: Yupelri (revefenacin) - long-acting nebulized LAMA bronchodilator (partnered Theravance)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Yupelri only nebulized LAMA in US; ~3-5% COPD nebulizer Rx

assets.name: Viatris Greater China branded generics
assets.stage: Commercial (FY25 ~$2.3B Greater China; legacy Pfizer Upjohn brands)

assets.name: Selatogrel - oral self-administered P2Y12 inhibitor for AMI (Idorsia)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Selatogrel niche AMI self-admin pre-hospital; ~5-15% post-MI Rx

assets.name: Cenerimod - selective S1P1 modulator for SLE (Idorsia)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Cenerimod novel oral S1P1 mechanism in SLE; ~5-10% SLE Rx if approved
